section.intent: Introduce the event story and theme.
section.contentHints: Narrative text about a futuristic ghost story, 'The Glitch in the Afterlife' theme description.

designPlan.goal: Deepen the user's interest through thematic storytelling.
designPlan.roleFit: Engages the visitor's curiosity about the 'Cyber-Night' concept.
designPlan.taskLoopFocus: Provides the context needed before the user evaluates the highlights.
designPlan.capabilityFocus: Uses typography and layout to reinforce the 'Immersive' capability.
designPlan.informationArchitecture: Single column of focused narrative text with decorative side elements.
designPlan.layoutIntent: Spacious, editorial-style layout with large margins.
designPlan.visualIntent: Monospace 'terminal' style text with subtle flickering effects.
designPlan.contentStrategy: Atmospheric copy that frames the event as an 'experience' rather than just a party.
constraints: Use high-contrast text on dark background
designPlan.rationale: Storytelling builds the 'world' of the event, increasing the perceived value of attending.

pageContext.title: Cyber-Night Halloween Home
pageContext.description: The main landing page for the cyberpunk Halloween event.

pageDesignPlan.pageGoal: The main landing page for the cyberpunk Halloween event.
pageDesignPlan.roleFit: This page primarily serves Potential Attendee.
pageDesignPlan.capabilityFocus: This page should make Immersive Event Information, Lead Capture System understandable and actionable.
pageDesignPlan.taskLoopCoverage: Help users progress through Event Registration Journey, Event Registration Journey, Event Registration Journey, Event Registration Journey, Event Registration Journey.
pageDesignPlan.narrativeArc: Move from orientation to persuasion, then social proof, and finish with a decisive conversion close.
pageDesignPlan.layoutStrategy: Use section rhythm, spacing, and contrast to support the entry stage of the user journey rather than making every block equally loud.
hierarchy: The first viewport should establish context and value quickly.
Mid-page sections should deepen trust or explain the offer.
Lower-page sections should reduce friction and reinforce action.
pageDesignPlan.transitionStrategy: Make transitions feel intentional through spacing, contrast shifts, and restrained motion rather than decorative separators.
sharedShellNotes: Assume global layout sections frame the page experience.
Keep page-specific sections visually coherent with the shared shell.
constraints: Preserve the given section order unless a wrapper or grouping is required for coherence.
Avoid repetitive section pacing; vary density and emphasis across the page.
pageDesignPlan.rationale: Default page planner framed Cyber-Night Halloween Home around role needs and the MVP journey rather than isolated sections.
